name: Herb Bread Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Prepare a 2-quart casserole dish with cooking spray; set aside.
3. In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
4. Add mushrooms, onions, and celery. Cook until all vegetables are tender.
5. Dissolve the bouillon cubes in boiling water.
6. Mix the dissolved bouillon into bread crumbs.
7. Stir in the cooked vegetables (mushrooms, onions, celery), sage, thyme, salt, parsley, garlic powder, and black pepper.
8. Place the entire mixture into the prepared casserole dish.
9. Bake for 45 minutes.
